metadata.description: Base name for all resources (e.g. pseudoai-prod). Must be globally unique for the Web App.
Azure region for all resources. Defaults to the resource group location.
App Service Plan pricing tier. B1 is the smallest Linux tier that supports containers.
Container image tag to deploy. Use "latest" or a specific "sha-<shortsha>" tag.
Deploy Application Insights and Log Analytics workspace for monitoring.
Initial password for the default login user (username: user). Leave empty to use the application fallback password.
Initial password for the default admin user (username: admin). Leave empty to use the application fallback password.
When true, force-reset the main admin credentials from INITIAL_ADMIN_USERNAME/INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD at startup.
When true, force-reset the initial user credentials from INITIAL_USER_USERNAME/INITIAL_USER_PASSWORD at startup.
When true, seed admins.json/users.json from admins_initial.json/users_initial.json when those runtime files are missing.

Stable HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for JWT tokens. Strongly recommended for production. Without it, PHP-FPM workers may each generate a different key on first startup, causing token validation failures across workers. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
OpenAI API key for AI integration (optional). Leave empty to disable.
Enable hidden debug entry in the admin interface for this Azure deployment.
Debug PIN code used by /auth/admin/debug/unlock (minimum 4 digits recommended).
Debug unlock TTL in seconds (minimum 60).
Maximum number of login attempts allowed per rate-limit window. Set 0 to disable login rate limiting.
Length of the login rate-limit window in seconds.
When true, log the effective login rate-limit config to the PHP error log for debugging.
GitHub username or organisation that owns the GHCR packages (e.g. dutchhamburgers). Only needed when the container images are not public.
When true, App Service pulls GHCR images with username/token credentials. Keep false for public GHCR packages.
GitHub Personal Access Token with read:packages scope. Required when GHCR images are private. Leave empty if packages are public.

metadata.description: The public URL of the deployed PseudoAI application.
Resource ID of the Web App.
